1. Step 1

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens.

## Screenshots/Logs

## Environment

- Browser: [e.g., Chrome, Firefox]

## Severity
- [ ] Critical (booking blocked)
- [ ] High (feature broken)
- [ ] Medium (functionality limited)
- [ ] Low (cosmetic issue)
